title: stenoloma tegulare
intro: Stenoloma tegulare is a type of fern that belongs to the Stenoloma genus, known for its unique foliage and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Stenoloma tegulare can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies. However, more research is needed to confirm the full extent of its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
